title: Charred German Sausage Skillet
description: A hearty, charred German sausage skillet made with flavorful sausages and crispy vegetables.

ingredients.name: German Sausage
ingredients.notes: You can use any type of German sausage, such as bratwurst or knockwurst.

ingredients.name: Skillet
ingredients.notes: A cast-iron skillet works best for this recipe.

ingredients.name: Pungent Onion
ingredients.notes: You can use any type of onion, but a pungent one will add more flavor.

ingredients.name: Charred Bell Pepper
ingredients.notes: You can char the bell pepper by holding it over the flame on your stovetop.

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: You can also use black pepper or any other seasoning you like.

instructions: Heat a skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onions and cook until they're caramelized, stirring occasionally.
Add the charred bell peppers and cook for another 2-3 minutes.
Add the German sausage to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Season with salt and serve hot.
Serve with crusty bread or over mashed potatoes for a filling breakfast.
